sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: Son of David, have mercy on me. What wilt thou that I do to thee? Lord, that I may see.
V. Be thou exalted, O Lord, in thy own strength.
R. We will sing and praise thy power.

sections.name: Lectio1
lines: @Tempora/Quadp3-0:Lectio1:s/-6/-5/ s/And when.*//s

sections.name: Lectio2
lines: @Tempora/Quadp3-0:Lectio1:s/-6/-8/ s/1-/5-/ s/1 .*(And when)/5 $1/s
@Tempora/Quadp3-0:Lectio2:s/!.*// s/9 .*//s

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. And God said to Abraham: Sara thy wife shall bear thee a son,
* And thou shalt call his name Isaac.
V. I will return and come to thee at this time, life accompanying, and Sara thy wife shall have a son
R. And thou shalt call his name Isaac.

sections.name: Lectio5
lines: @Tempora/Quadp3-0:Lectio4:s/For that .*//s

sections.name: Lectio6
lines: @Tempora/Quadp3-0:Lectio4:s/.* For that /For that /s s/$/~/
@Tempora/Quadp3-0:Lectio5:s/But as .*//s

sections.name: Lectio7
lines: @Tempora/Quadp3-0:Lectio5:s/.* But as /But as /s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. And the Lord visited Sara, as he had promised: and fulfilled what he had spoken, and she conceived and bore a son in her old age,
* At the time that God had foretold her.
V. And Abraham called the name of his son, whom Sara bore him, Isaac.
R. At the time that God had foretold her.
